title: aristea angolensis subsp. angolensis
intro: Aristea angolensis subsp. angolensis, also known as the Cape aristea or Angolan aristea, is a plant species belonging to the Iridaceae family, characterized by its attractive yellow flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aristea angolensis subsp. angolensis include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat its listed health benefits.
